title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: September 14, 2023
summary: September 14 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 4.46% , from the level on 09/07/2023 of 4.458 M km 2 to 4.259 M km 2 for this week. The sea ice extent is now at about the 3rd lowest level ever at this time year and about tied with 2018, but st...

title: Congratulations, Carlos! Alaska SBDC’s 2023 State Star
summary: Congratulations to Carlos Machuca , Alaska SBDC Anchorage Center Director, on being awarded the 2023 State Star!
